steps.title: Compare the coefficients
steps.content: Form ratios of the matching $x$, $y$, and constant terms in $$0.5x + 1.2y = 9$$ and $$1.5x + 3.6y = 27$$. This gives $\frac{1.5}{0.5}=\frac{3.6}{1.2}=\frac{27}{9}=3$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: All three ratios are equal, so the equations are equivalent — infinitely many solutions. That matches choice A — A is correct.
